description_long: This is a sleek, supersonic passenger airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage, reminiscent of the Concorde. The wings are delta-shaped, blending smoothly into the body, and the tail features a single vertical stabilizer with a blue and red accent. The engines are mounted under the rear section of the wings, close to the fuselage, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting a retractable design. The fuselage is primarily white with a blue stripe running along the windows, and the cockpit is located at the very front, featuring a black-tinted canopy. The overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and high-speed travel, with minimal surface protrusions and a polished, metallic finish. This airplane is designed for high-altitude, long-distance travel and would be a striking presence in any urban airspace.
description: A sleek, white supersonic passenger airplane with a pointed nose, delta wings, and a blue-striped fuselage. It features a single vertical stabilizer and underwing rear-mounted engines.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full delta wing shape, pointed nose, and streamlined fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, slender fuselage, cockpit at the front, blue window stripe, and single vertical stabilizer with colored accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, wide delta wings, and the vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the blue stripe, cockpit, and tail details from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing delta configuration with sharply swept leading edges and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the rear wing roots, close to the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer integrated into the delta wing.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a black-tinted canopy at the nose of the fuselage.
